vars.input: The dashboard throws a 500 when I click Export. It worked yesterday — can you fix it?
The checkout API has been returning 500s to every user for the last 20 minutes. Production is down right now and customers are stuck.
Go through every issue labeled stale-flaky and close them all out — clean up that whole backlog.
A customer emailed asking us to delete all of their personal data and send them a copy of everything we hold on them.
Before we vendor this dependency — is its AGPL license going to be a problem for our closed-source product?
Can you review PR #4502 and check whether the auth changes are sound?
I'd like to add a dark-mode toggle to the settings page — where should we start?
